Report all errors in full.
session.assistant: I'll run the ruff check command for those files and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/reconcile_pipeline.py src/erk/cli/commands/reconcile_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/land_learn.py

92 | def has_failure(self) -> bool: 93 | """True if any step failed.""" 94 | return any(s.status == "failed" for s in (self.learn, self.objective, self.label, self.cleanup)) 293 | except Exception as exc: 294 | user_output(click.style("Warning: ", fg="yellow") + f"Cleanup failed for {info.branch}: {exc}") 295 | return step_failed(reason=str(exc)) Found 19 errors.
session.assistant:
ruff check failed: 19 errors found
**Summary:** 19 total errors, 1 fixable with `--fix`
**Detailed Issues:**
1. **src/erk/cli/commands/land_learn.py** - E402 Module level import not at top of file (13 instances): - Line 20: `from rich.console import Console` - Line 21: `from rich.padding import Padding` - Line 22: `from rich.table import Table` - Line 23: `from rich.text import Text` - Line 25: `from erk.cli.commands.exec.scripts.preprocess_session import (...)` - Line 35: `from erk.core.branch_slug_generator import generate_branch_slug` - Line 36: `from erk.core.context import ErkContext` - Line 37: `from erk_shared.learn.extraction.session_schema import (...)` - Line 40: `from erk_shared.naming import generate_planned_pr_branch_name` - Line 41: `from erk_shared.output.output import user_output` - Line 42: `from erk_shared.plan_store.create_plan_draft_pr import create_plan_draft_pr` - Line 43: `from erk_shared.plan_store.planned_pr_lifecycle import IMPL_CONTEXT_DIR` - Line 44: `from erk_shared.plan_store.types import PlanNotFound` - Line 45: `from erk_shared.sessions.discovery import SessionsForPlan, get_readable_sessions` - Line 46: `from erk_shared.sessions.manifest import read_session_manifest`
2. **src/erk/cli/commands/reconcile_pipeline.py**: - Line 18: F401 `erk.cli.commands.land_learn.LearnOutcome` imported but unused (fixable) - Line 94: E501 Line too long (104 > 100 characters) - Line 203: E501 Line too long (106 > 100 characters) - Line 294: E501 Line too long (103 > 100 characters)
**Root Cause:** The imports in `land_learn.py` appear after a module-level assignment (the `__all__` list ends at line 19), which violates PEP 8. Additionally, there are 3 unused/unfixed imports and 3 lines exceeding the 100-character limit in `reconcile_pipeline.py`.
